text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race, Ines Fujin is trembling with sheer
anticipation. I can tell she's even more excited
now than she was before her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us have chased her dream right onto
this grand stage, and no doubt she's about to
show me where it goes next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But standing in the way are Mejiro Ryan and
Oguri Cap—two rivals whose hearts burn with the
determination to live up to their fans'
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without a moment's hesitation, Ines boldly
declares that she's going to enjoy this race more
than anyone. The Arima Kinen of dreams begins!
